bot_config.name: AssistBot
bot_config.welcome_message: Hello! I am AssistBot, your customer support assistant. How can I help you today?
bot_config.name_request: It seems we haven't met. May I know your name, please?
bot_config.name_remembered: Welcome back, {name}! How can I help you now?
bot_config.follow_up_prompt: Is there anything else I can assist you with regarding {context}?
fallback_responses: I'm sorry, I couldn't find a match for your query. Try rephrasing or contact support@company.com.
I am unable to answer that question. Would you like to check our working hours or contact customer care?
